title: orchis mascula subsp. wanjkovii
intro: Orchis mascula subsp. wanjkovii is a subspecies of the Orchis mascula, also known as the early purple orchid, a type of orchid native to Central and Eastern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of iridoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Orchis mascula subsp. wanjkovii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
